That means I can build a real-data sample itinerary, but not a genuinely followable future spring 30-arena trip unless the 2026-27 schedule is published. I’m going to verify whether a future schedule exists before I spend time on hotels/flights around past dates."

"I’m blocked from making the exact trip “actually followable” right now: NBA.com has the 2025-26 schedule, but those spring regular-season games are already past; the next spring regular season would be 2026-27, and the regular-season schedule is expected in August 2026. <citation refs=\"NH_1MGK2WmxKDZTv5_MzS\">“The NBA is expected to release the regular season schedule in August 2026.”</citation> Historically, NBA.com released full regular-season schedules in mid-August, for example the 2024-25 schedule release was updated August 20, 2024. <citation refs=\"FEElvZq4FaTcut9IlzZGA\">“The NBA has released its full schedule for the NBA 2024-25 season.”</citation>"
